Production-ready Sui Game Platform

Build, battle, breed, and trade living Monster NFTs on Sui.

Monster NFT battle arena on Sui with wallet + kiosk inventory, breeding, and live PvP coordination.

Enter ArenaOpen My MonstersCustomize Gear

Wallet + Kiosk Inventory

Pull Monster NFTs from both your connected wallet and all Kiosks owned by your account.

Live Arena Coordination

See online players, send battle invites, accept challenges, and spectate active fights in real time.

On-chain Battle Controls

Use contract actions for create_match, deposit_monster, deposit_stake, and start_battle.

Breeding + Equipment

Breed adult monsters on-chain and manage cosmetic equipment sets per monster for battle identity.

On-chain Deployment
